memberdef.name: AccQ8Type
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "arith.AccQ8", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AccQ8Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AccQ8_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "AccQ8 type.", .tp_methods = AccQ8_methods, .tp_new = AccQ8_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AccQ8_init, }
